title: Ordinance Enacting the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2021 in the Amount of Ninety-one Million Eighty-four Thousand Seven Hundred Twenty-four Pesos and 54/100 (P 91,084,724.54) Covering Various Expenditures for General Fund Proper in the Amount of Ninety Million Two Hundred Thirty-two Thousand Three Hundred Eighteen Pesos and 54/100 (P 90,232,318.54), Market Operation in the Amount of Six Hundred Ninety-five Thousand One Hundred Fifty-eight Pesos and 00/100 (P 695,158.00) and Slaughterhouse Op
